output.code:
s = s
quotes=[]
i=0
while True:
    start = s.find('"', i)
    if start==-1: break
    end = s.find('"', start+1)
    if end==-1: break
    quotes.append((start+1,end, s[start+1:end]))
    i=end+1
quotes, len(quotes)

results=[]
for start,end,text in quotes:
    context = s[max(0,start-64):min(len(s),end+64)]
    results.append((start,end,text,context))
for r in results:
    print('start',r[0],'end',r[1])
    print(r[3])
    print('------')

# Build list
items=[]
for start,end,text in quotes:
    span_text=text
    span_start=start
    span_end = start + len(span_text)
    assert s[span_start:span_end]==span_text
    # classify cue search +-64
    ctx = s[max(0,span_start-64):min(len(s),span_end+64)]
    typ = 'Aya'
    if 'قال النبي' in ctx or 'قال الرسول' in ctx or 'قال النبي صلى' in ctx or 'في الحديث' in ctx or 'رواه' in ctx:
        typ='Hadeeth'
    items.append({"span_start":span_start,"span_end":span_end,"span_text":span_text,"citation_type":typ})
items, len(items)

items=[]
for start,end,text in quotes:
    span_start=start
    span_end = end
    ctx = s[max(0,span_start-64):min(len(s),span_end+64)]
    # detect cues
    aya_cue_terms = ['قال الله','قال الله تعالى','سورة','الآية','كما قال تعالى','قال تعالى','سورة']
    hadeeth_cue_terms = ['قال النبي','قال الرسول','في الحديث','رواه','حدثنا','عن النبي','قال رسول الله','صلى الله عليه وسلم','النبي صلى']
    is_aya = any(t in ctx for t in aya_cue_terms)
    is_had = any(t in ctx for t in hadeeth_cue_terms)
    # if both, prefer ayah (rule)
    if is_aya:
        typ='Aya'
    elif is_had:
        typ='Hadeeth'
    else:
        typ='Aya'  # default maybe aya
    items.append({"span_start":span_start,"span_end":span_end,"span_text":text,"citation_type":typ})
items

items=[]
for start,end,text in quotes:
    span_start=start
    span_end = end
    pre = s[max(0,span_start-40):span_start]
    post = s[span_end: min(len(s), span_end+40)]
    ctx = s[max(0,span_start-64):min(len(s),span_end+64)]
    aya_cue = any(t in ctx for t in aya_cue_terms)
    had_cue = any(t in ctx for t in hadeeth_cue_terms)
    pre_had = any(t in pre for t in hadeeth_cue_terms)
    # decide
    if pre_had:
        typ='Hadeeth'
    elif aya_cue and not had_cue:
        typ='Aya'
    elif had_cue and not aya_cue:
        typ='Hadeeth'
    else:
        # fallback: detect typical Quranic starting words
        if text.strip().startswith(('إِنَّ','يَا','قُلْ','وَمَا','فَلْيَحْذَرِ','يَا')):
            typ='Aya'
        else:
            typ='Hadeeth'
    items.append({"span_start":span_start,"span_end":span_end,"span_text":text,"citation_type":typ})
